object.description: Indicates this is a list response.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Directory User.

directory_id.description: The identifier of the Directory the Directory User belongs to.

organization_id.description: The identifier for the Organization in which the Directory resides.

idp_id.description: Unique identifier for the user, assigned by the Directory Provider. Different Directory Providers use different ID formats.

email.description: The email address of the user.

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

primary.description: Whether this is the primary email address.

emails.description: A list of email addresses for the user.

job_title.description: The job title of the user.

raw_attributes.description: The raw attributes received from the directory provider.

custom_attributes.description: An object containing the custom attribute mapping for the Directory Provider.

slug.description: The slug of the assigned role.

role.description: The primary role assigned to the user.
role.title: SlimRole

slug.description: The slug of the assigned role.

items.description: The primary role assigned to the user.
items.title: SlimRole

roles.description: All roles assigned to the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Directory Group.

idp_id.description: Unique identifier for the group, assigned by the Directory Provider. Different Directory Providers use different ID formats.

directory_id.description: The identifier of the Directory the Directory Group belongs to.

organization_id.description: The identifier for the Organization in which the Directory resides.

name.description: The name of the Directory Group.

raw_attributes.description: The raw attributes received from the directory provider.

groups.description: The directory groups the user belongs to. Deprecated: starting May 1, 2026, this field returns an empty array by default for newly created teams. Existing teams currently depending on this field should migrate to the new access pattern for better throughput performance — the field is unbounded by user, so users with many group memberships produce large, slow response payloads. Use the List Directory Groups endpoint with a `user` filter to fetch a user's group memberships.

data.description: The list of records for the current page.

before.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the start of the list.

after.description: An object ID that defines your place in the list. When the ID is not present, you are at the end of the list.

list_metadata.description: Pagination cursors for navigating between pages of results.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
A human-readable description of the error.
A human-readable description of the error.
